flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 58% at Humacao Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (207 vs 495).

flags.label: 150%-time completion

flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Humacao Community College rose 51% between 2006 and 2009 (501 → 758).
